5. No explanation of why these fields are considered mandatory for Italian accommodation receipts

SUMMARY: The recommendations lack specificity and actionability. They all suggest the same generic solution without tailoring advice to the document type (booking confirmation vs. receipt) or providing clear steps to resolve the issues. The system should better distinguish between document types and provide more specific guidance on what information is truly required for compliance in Italy for accommodation receipts versus booking confirmations.
